target_host.role: shared Lemmata VPS intended for bounded Delta public alpha

pre_mutation_gate.provenance_note: Generated as a separate runbook step before installer dispatch; the guarded installer correctly refused it as the accepted preflight phase.

installer_dispatch.reason: The then-current runbook supplied pre-mutation evidence while the installer contract requires the accepted pre-docker baseline and owns the final pre-mutation capture.

post_failure_read_only_verification.evidence_form: content-free operator transcript summarized in the companion evidence report; no separate native JSON was created

command: On the exact root-only operations tree, run p014_host_gate.py pre-docker; then follow the then-current Phase 3 runbook by creating pre-mutation evidence and invoking p014_install_docker_ubuntu.sh with that pre-mutation file as --preflight; after the fail-closed rejection, run a read-only no-mutation verification (full content-free details retained in provenance/evidence/P014/docker-install-preflight-contract-failure-20260717.md).

replay.working_directory: Root-only target-host operations tree /root/p014-ops-25fc2cadbba2147db6c7767e802088706a305f28 plus an authorised operator workstation
replay.command: On the exact root-only operations tree, run p014_host_gate.py pre-docker; then follow the then-current Phase 3 runbook by creating pre-mutation evidence and invoking p014_install_docker_ubuntu.sh with that pre-mutation file as --preflight; after the fail-closed rejection, run a read-only no-mutation verification (full content-free details retained in provenance/evidence/P014/docker-install-preflight-contract-failure-20260717.md).
limitations: The target host and public network are mutable, so later health and latency values may differ.
The SSH credential and registry credential are deliberately not retained; replay requires separate authorisation.
The post-failure no-mutation verification was retained in the operator transcript and companion report, not as a third native gate JSON.
The installer rejection is reproducible from the exact source contract, but the failed live-host dispatch should not be repeated merely to reproduce a known documentation defect.
This run did not install Docker, pull an image, start Delta, test localhost-only Delta, edit Caddy or DNS, run coexistence load, test restart/rollback, or obtain activation acceptance.

notes: The fresh live-host baseline passed, but the first Docker installer dispatch failed closed before mutation because the runbook and deployment validator supplied the wrong evidence phase. The installer behaved correctly and was not weakened. No host package, repository, Docker data root, service, listener, Caddyfile, DNS record, or public route changed. The failed run remains permanent evidence; a corrected installation requires a new Run after normal review and green CI.
